latin: Dio ridens rogavit: 'accedisne ad me?' Jotaro respondit: 'propius venire debeo ut te verberem.' lente et audacter ambulavit.

questions.target: He needs to get closer to beat him
choices: He needs to get closer to beat him

questions.prompt: How does Jotaro walk toward Dio?

translation: Dio, laughing, asked: 'Are you approaching me?' Jotaro responded: 'I must come closer so I can beat you.' He walked slowly and boldly.
